title: Rust lichen-core/lichen-rpl: update CCP-16 TDMA, load balancing, metrics, CBOR to match spec/02a tables and vectors
description: Review and fix Rust implementations in rust/lichen-core, lichen-rpl, lichen-node for conformance to spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md sections on TDMA slots/hash, adaptive_sf_select, density/load metrics, desync FSM, CBOR signaling. Ensure test vectors in ccp16.json, ccp_tdma.json, ccp_load_balancing.json all pass. Check thresholds per spec tables.
